# Accountability.ai

> The open standard for court-admissible AI decision records. Accountability.ai stewards the Atomic Genesis Decision Record (AgDR), an open standard for tamper-evident, cryptographically signed records of every autonomous AI decision, admissible under the Canada Evidence Act, EU AI Act Article 12, and existing fiduciary law. Stewarded by the Genesis Glass Foundation. Dual-licensed CC0 1.0 and Apache 2.0.

## Start Here

- [Getting Started](https://accountability.ai/getting-started.html): SDK install, first AKI capture, PPP triplet definition, verification.
- [Manifesto](https://accountability.ai/manifesto.html): Why the standard exists and what it guarantees.
- [Sandbox](https://accountability.ai/sandbox.html): Live in-browser demonstration of AgDR decision capture across six domains.

## Standard and Specification

- [AgDR v0.2 Specification](https://accountability.ai/agdr-spec.html): The Atomic Genesis Decision Record specification.
- [AKI Formal Definition](https://accountability.ai/aki-formal-definition.html): Mathematical definition of Atomic Kernel Inference capture.
- [AKI 0.95 Specification](https://accountability.ai/aki-95.html): Technical specification for the 950ns atomic kernel force gating.
- [PPP Pillars](https://accountability.ai/ppp-pillars.html): Provenance, Place, Purpose, the three pillars captured at the inference instant.
- [FOI Formal Definition](https://accountability.ai/foi-formal-definition.html): Fiduciary Office Intervener, the terminal accountability role.
- [Human Delta Chain Specification](https://accountability.ai/human-delta-chain-spec.html): Data structure for human oversight events.
- [Verification and Audit Procedure](https://accountability.ai/verification-audit-procedure.html): Court-ready evidence packaging and independent verification.

## Legal and Compliance

- [PPP Legal Compliance](https://accountability.ai/ppp-legal-compliance.html): How the PPP triplet maps to legal compliance across jurisdictions.
- [Canada Evidence Act Compliance](https://accountability.ai/cea-compliance.html): Admissibility under CEA section 31.1 business records.
- [CBCA Fiduciary Mapping](https://accountability.ai/cbca-fiduciary-mapping.html): Director fiduciary duty under Canada Business Corporations Act section 122.
- [Fiduciary Duty of Care](https://accountability.ai/fiduciary-duty-of-care.html): How AgDR maps to the common-law duty of care.
- [EU AI Act Mapping](https://accountability.ai/eu-ai-act-mapping.html): Article-by-article compliance analysis for the EU AI Act.
- [CBSA Mapping](https://accountability.ai/cbsa-mapping.html): Canada Border Services Agency traceability requirements.
- [Bills of Exchange Mapping](https://accountability.ai/bills-of-exchange-mapping.html): Commercial finality for autonomous agents.
- [Legal Glossary](https://accountability.ai/legal-glossary.html): Chain of definition taxonomy.

## Engineering

- [Technical Details](https://accountability.ai/technical-details.html): Full technical stack reference.
- [Rust Core](https://accountability.ai/rust-core.html): Core runtime implementation.
- [Horizontal Scaling](https://accountability.ai/horizontal-scaling.html): Scaling beyond 2.85 billion decisions per process.
- [TSX Stress Test](https://accountability.ai/tsx-stress-test.html): 100 million decisions, 253,000 per second stress test results.
- [AKI Capture Deep Explanation](https://accountability.ai/aki-capture-deep-explanation.html): Technical deep-dive into the AKI capture mechanism.
- [Technical Note: Coherence](https://accountability.ai/technical-note-coherence.html): Coherence engine technical note.

## Industry and Comparisons

- [PPP Industry Templates](https://accountability.ai/ppp-industry-templates.html): Ready-to-use PPP definitions for capital markets, healthcare, government, legal, financial services, and critical infrastructure.
- [PPP Export Control](https://accountability.ai/ppp-export-control.html): PPP applied to export control compliance.
- [Aviation Black Box Comparison](https://accountability.ai/comparison-aviation-black-box.html): AgDR compared to aviation flight data recorders.
- [Medical Records Comparison](https://accountability.ai/comparison-medical-records.html): AgDR compared to medical recordkeeping standards.

## Vision

- [AGI Court in 2076](https://accountability.ai/future-agi-court.html): Forward-looking analysis of AgDR as legal evidence in the AGI era.
- [AGI Court Precedents](https://accountability.ai/agi-court-precedents.html): Precedent analysis for AgDR as admissible evidence.
- [Beauty, Truth, Wisdom](https://accountability.ai/beauty-truth-wisdom.html): The three closing questions of every AgDR record.

## Governance

- [CHANGELOG](https://accountability.ai/CHANGELOG.html): Version history and amendments to the AgDR standard.
- [Contributing](https://accountability.ai/CONTRIBUTING.html): How to contribute to the standard.
- [License Update](https://accountability.ai/LICENSE-UPDATE.html): Dual-licensed CC0 1.0 Universal and Apache License 2.0.
- [Terms](https://accountability.ai/terms.html): Terms of use.
